---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---

This is an [R Markdown](http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com) Notebook. When you execute code within the notebook, the results appear beneath the code. 

Try executing this chunk by clicking the *Run* button within the chunk or by placing your cursor inside it and pressing *Ctrl+Shift+Enter*. 

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(data.table)
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(vcd)      # For assocstats (Chi-square + Cramér’s V)
library(MASS)     # For log-linear models
library(pracma)
#library(peakPick)
library(quantmod)
library(ggpmisc)
library(tidyverse)
library(magrittr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggfortify)
library(forecast)
library(tsibble)
library(broom)
library(tidyquant)
library(tsbox)
library("pheatmap")
library("RColorBrewer")
library(ggpmisc)
library(ggfortify)
library(viridis) # Default Color Maps from 'matplotlib' 
library(hrbrthemes)
library(colorspace)
library(ggpubr)
library(ggmosaic)

```



## load existing/saved environment (.RData)
```{r}
Path_1 <- dirname(rstudioapi::getSourceEditorContext()$path)
setwd(Path_1)
saved_path <- paste(Path_1, "Axon_retraction_count.RData",  sep = "/")
load(file=saved_path)
Path_1 <- dirname(rstudioapi::getSourceEditorContext()$path)
```

# save environment (.RData)
```{r}
Path_1 <- dirname(rstudioapi::getSourceEditorContext()$path)
saved_path <- paste(Path_1, "Axon_retraction_count.RData",  sep = "/")
save.image(file=saved_path)
```

```{r}
axon_kink <- read_excel("CK666_axon_retraction_count_3.xlsx", range = "A1:G128") %>% as.data.table()
```


```{r}
tab_abc <- xtabs(~ Axon_kinks + Axon_retraction + DIV, data = axon_kink)


# Fit log-linear model with all interactions (saturated model)
model_saturated <- loglm(~ Axon_kinks * Axon_retraction * DIV, data = tab_abc)
summary(model_saturated)

# Fit reduced model without 3-way interaction
model_reduced <- loglm(~ Axon_kinks * Axon_retraction + Axon_kinks * DIV + Axon_retraction * DIV, data = tab_abc)
summary(model_reduced)

# Compare models (check if 3-way interaction is significant)
anova(model_reduced, model_saturated)
```
```{r}
# Convert contingency table to data frame
df_counts <- as.data.frame(tab_abc)

# Fit Poisson regression with pairwise interactions only
glm_reduced <- glm(Freq ~ Axon_kinks * Axon_retraction + Axon_kinks * DIV + Axon_retraction * DIV, family = poisson, data = df_counts)

summary(glm_reduced)

```


```{r}
# A vs B
tab_ab <- table(axon_kink$Minor_kinks, axon_kink$Minor_retraction)
print(tab_ab)
chisq.test(tab_ab, simulate.p.value = T)
assocstats(tab_ab)  # includes Cramér’s V

vcd::mosaic(~ Axon_kinks + Axon_retraction, data = axon_kink, shade = TRUE)
```


```{r}
# A vs C
tab_ac <- table(axon_kink$Minor_kinks, axon_kink$DIV)
print(tab_ac)
chisq.test(tab_ac, simulate.p.value = T)
assocstats(tab_ac)

vcd::mosaic(~ DIV + Axon_kinks, data = axon_kink, shade = TRUE)
```


```{r}
# B vs C
tab_bc <- table(axon_kink$Axon_retraction, axon_kink$DIV)
print(tab_bc)
chisq.test(tab_bc, simulate.p.value = T)
assocstats(tab_bc)

vcd::mosaic(~ DIV + Axon_retraction, data = axon_kink, shade = TRUE)
```
```{r}
ggplot(data = axon_kink) +
  geom_mosaic(aes(x = product(DIV), fill = Minor_kinks), na.rm = TRUE) +
  # labs(x = "Axon_kinks and Axon_retraction", fill = "DIV") +
#  theme_minimal() + 
scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set2")+
 theme_ipsum(grid = F, ticks = T) +
 theme_linedraw()+
   theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5), 
        plot.margin = margin(0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5, "cm"),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "right",
        axis.text=element_text(size=12, face="bold"), axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0)) #for centering the text 
```

```{r}
ggsave(
  "DIV_Minor_kinks.pdf",
  plot = last_plot(),
  device = "pdf")

```

```{r}
ggplot(data = axon_kink) +
  geom_mosaic(aes(x = product(DIV), fill = Axon_retraction), na.rm = TRUE) +
  # labs(x = "Axon_kinks and Axon_retraction", fill = "DIV") +
#  theme_minimal() + 
scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set2")+
 theme_ipsum(grid = F, ticks = T) +
 theme_linedraw()+
   theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5), 
        plot.margin = margin(0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5, "cm"),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "right",
        axis.text=element_text(size=12, face="bold"), axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0)) #for centering the text 
```

```{r}
ggsave(
  "DIV_retraction.pdf",
  plot = last_plot(),
  device = "pdf")

```
```{r}
ggplot(data = axon_kink) +
  geom_mosaic(aes(x = product(Minor_retraction), fill = Minor_kinks), na.rm = TRUE) +
  # labs(x = "Axon_kinks and Axon_retraction", fill = "DIV") +
#  theme_minimal() + 
scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set2")+
 theme_ipsum(grid = F, ticks = T) +
 theme_linedraw()+
   theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5), 
        plot.margin = margin(0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5, "cm"),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "right",
        axis.text=element_text(size=12, face="bold"), axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0)) #for centering the text 
```

```{r}
ggsave(
  "Minor_kink_retraction.pdf",
  plot = last_plot(),
  device = "pdf")

```
